plot.descricao: Stores vineyard plot data including area, altitude, slope, planting year, and spacing. Each plot belongs to a property. Example: plot 'Quinta Norte A1' with 2.5 ha, planted 2018.
plot.justificacao_uso: Core business table for plot management queries.

property.descricao: Stores property/farm information. Each property belongs to an entity and contains multiple plots. Example: property 'Quinta do Vale' with 15 ha total.
property.justificacao_uso: Core table for property-level queries and aggregations.

v_field_base.descricao: Pre-joined view of plots with property, municipality, training system, irrigation, rootstock, and conduction system. Use for plot queries that need resolved text names.
v_field_base.justificacao_uso: Primary view for plot queries -- all text columns already resolved.

v_field_crop_variety.descricao: Pre-joined view of plots with crop types, grape varieties, and production modes. Use for variety and production mode queries.
v_field_crop_variety.justificacao_uso: Primary view for crop and variety queries.

cultural_practice.descricao: Central table for field operations (pruning, spraying, harvesting, etc.). Each practice is linked to a plot and has associated resources.
cultural_practice.justificacao_uso: Core business table for field operation queries.

resource.descricao: Hub table for all resources: workers, equipment, fertilizers, phytopharmaceutical products. Each resource has a type.
resource.justificacao_uso: Central resource table for practice resource queries.

mv_plot_resource_full.descricao: Materialized view joining cultural practices with all resources (HR, equipment, fertilizers, phytopharmaceuticals). Contains hours, costs, and plot/property info. Faster than v_plot_resource_full for repeated queries.
mv_plot_resource_full.justificacao_uso: Primary materialized view for practice queries with all resources.

v_plot_resource_full.descricao: Live view joining cultural practices with all resources. Same structure as mv_plot_resource_full but always up-to-date.
v_plot_resource_full.justificacao_uso: Live view alternative to materialized view.

mv_calendar_hr.descricao: Monthly calendar of worker hours and days worked, grouped by month and year. Use for HR scheduling queries.
mv_calendar_hr.justificacao_uso: Calendar view for human resource planning.

mv_calendar_equipment.descricao: Monthly calendar of equipment usage hours, grouped by month and year. Use for equipment scheduling queries.

lot.descricao: Central wine lot tracking table. Each lot has a wine type, current phase, and belongs to a cellar entity. Example: lot 'DOC Red 2024' currently in aging phase.
lot.justificacao_uso: Core table for wine lot management.

tank.descricao: Stores tank and barrel information for wine storage. Tanks have capacities and materials (stainless steel, oak).

v_cellar_operations.descricao: Pre-joined view of cellar operations with lot and tank names. Use for operation queries per lot, tank, or date.
v_cellar_operations.justificacao_uso: Primary view for cellar operation queries.

v_cellar_volumes.descricao: Aggregated wine volumes by type and production phase. Use for inventory and stock queries.
v_cellar_volumes.justificacao_uso: Inventory view for wine volume queries.

v_cellar_losses.descricao: Aggregated wine losses by type, lot, and date. Use for loss analysis queries.

v_cellar_consumables.descricao: Aggregated consumable usage (bottles, corks, labels) by product type. Use for consumable inventory and cost queries.

v_cellar_hr_calendar.descricao: Monthly calendar of worker hours in cellar operations. Use for HR scheduling in winemaking.
v_cellar_hr_calendar.justificacao_uso: Calendar view for cellar HR planning.
